sections.paragraph:
πήλινος, η, ον (πηλός; Demosth. et al.; PPetr III, 48, 9 [241 b.c.]; LXX; SibOr 3, 589; Tat. 22, 1) made of clay οἰκίας π. houses of clay 1 Cl 39:5 (Job 4:19).—DELG s.v. πηλός.

Demosth Demosth , IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PPetr PPetr = The Flinders Petrie Papyri—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

SibOr SibOr = Oracula Sibyllina, II–III a.d.—List 5

Tat Tat , II a.d.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 811
